name: Fresh Apple Cake 5
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour sugar over apples and let stand for 20 minutes.
2. Add salad oil and egg to the apple mixture. Stir well.
3. Sift flour, soda, baking powder, cinnamon, allspice, and salt into a separate bowl.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the apple mixture.
5. Fold in chopped nuts.
6. Pour the batter into a loaf or tube pan lined with parchment paper.
7. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for one hour.
